titleStmt.title: SII 41.126: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 126. (A.R. No. 125 of 1905.) Tirukkuṟuṅguḍi, Nāṅgunēri Taluk, Tirunelvēli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the nambi temple at Tirukkurungguḍi.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya Māṟavarman Sundara-pāṇḍya I, Year 12 = 1228 A.D.

summary.p: This is a resolution of the mahāsabhā of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to exempt, from taxes, the land shares being enjoyed by a Nambi in their village. Perhaps Nambi was a priest in the Vaishṇava temple of Tirukkuṟuṅguḍi and therefore the resolution was communicated to the Śrīvaishṇavas of that temple. The mahāsabhā undertook to add the remitted taxes to the taxes towards the kaḍaikkar-jīvitam (?) in their village. The remitted taxes were kaḍamai, antarāyam, uḻutāṉkuḍi, vari and vārapalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
śrīrājarājaścattu
rvvedimaṅkalattu mahā
sabhaiyOm Olai
tirukkuṟuṅkuṭi tirup
ppati śrīvayiṣṇavar
kaṇṭu nampi Eṅ
kaḷ Ūril Eḻuti
uṭaiyāryaṉu
bhavittu porukiṟa
paṅkiṉ vaḻiyālu
Ēri kiḻ nilaṅkaḷukku I
ṟuppiṉpaṭi yā
luḷḷa kaṭamai A
ntarāyam Uḻutāṉ
kuṭi pāṭikāvalum va
riyu, vārapalamum ma
ṟṟu Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉa
vum Uḷpaṭa nampikku nit
tal nimantaṅkaḷukkut ta
virappeṟa veṉu
meṉṟum śrīkomā
ṟa paṉmarāṉa tritribhuva
ṉac cakkaravattika
ḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅ
kiyaruḷiya śrīcuntāra
pāṇṭiya devaṟku yā
ṇṭu 10 2vatu kāṟ
tikai māsam Attiru
ppati śrīvayiṣṇavaril
Āsuritaṉiyiṉañ
ciṅkamāṉa mutaliyā
rśrī parakāla dāsar na
ṭuviṟ kōyililē sa
bhaikūṭiirukka nam
pi tirumukaṅkoṇṭu
vantu Iṭṭu Innila
ṅkaḷāl vanta kaṭamai
Antarayam Uḻutā
ṉ kuṭiyāṭi kāvalu
m variyum vārapalamum
maṟṟumeppēṟppa
ṭṭaṉavum taviravē
ṇūmeṉṟu co
ṉṉamaiyil Iv
viṟaikaṉ Ivvāṇ
ṭu pacāṉ mutal canrādi
ttavaṟ tavintu kuṭu
ttu Ippaṭikkuk
kalliluñ cempil
lum veṭṭikko
ḷka Ivviṟuppukku
t talaimāṟu kaṭaikkar
jīvitakku Iṭum
variyōṭē kūṭa I
ṟuttu kuṭuppōmāṉa
maikku Ippaṭik kivai
pāppākuṟiccic caṅ
karaṉ tēṭākariyāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai [§]
Ivai kurōviya
mutabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai kurōvi śrīkumāra
bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
tuṟumuṇṭūr tiruvaraṅka
muṭaiyāṉ sōmaiyā
ji Eḻuttu Ivai nipai
Āyappiḷḷai Eḻut
tu Ivaiyemap pē
ṟūr nārasimhaṉ śrīkra
ṣṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai E
mappēṟūr śrīkraṣṇaṉ
paṟpaṉāpaṉ Eḻuttu I
vai tuppil tirumalai
poliya niṉṟāṉ Eḻut
tu Ivai Iṭattuṟai
sōmaiyāji nam
pi Āḷvāṉ Eḻuttu
kōvatta vala ciṅkap
pirāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
tirunallūr Utā
Digital edition of SII 41.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
